---
title: "Movies"
---

# Favourite Movies

#### Top movies? Hell yes! You won't believe my top 1.

## 3. Shutter Island

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/img/movie3.jpg){width="400" height="400"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1SiNL_02StY width="600" height="400" >}}
:::
:::

## 2. Schindler's List

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/img/movie2.jpg){width="400" height="400"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1SiNL_02StY width="600" height="400" >}}
:::
:::

## 2. Freddy Got Fingered

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/img/movie1.jpg){width="400" height="400"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bz4RaZqA6w4 width="600" height="400" >}}
:::
:::
